title: Pehli Sher Doosari Savaasher Navara Paavsher
original_title: पहली शेर, दुसरी सव्वाशेर, नवरा पावशेर
overview: Pandu, a villager, is frustrated as his wife Kamala is unable to conceive. When the villagers boycott them, Pandu decides to marry Kamala's sister, hoping to become a father.
